title: eleocharis ravenelii
intro: Eleocharis ravenelii, also known as the Ravenel's spike-rush, is a type of sedge or rush plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis ravenelii include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as digestive problems, like diarrhea and stomach cramps. Herbal preparations of Eleocharis ravenelii can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
